subject: ap-calculus-bc
title: Analysis of Functions
stimulus:
The graph of the continuous function g, the derivative of the function f, is shown above. The function g is
piecewise linear for − 5 £ x < 3, and g ( x ) = 2 ( x − 4 )2 for 3 £ x £ 6.
